impact: This gives the supervisor and worker deterministic recovery rules for checkbox-15/18 style failures: prefer one-file fixture validators, inspect accepted JSON fixtures before adding tests, avoid process-model implementation code, and enforce syntactic validity before broader validation. That should let the daemon resume meaningful autonomous progress instead of retrying oversized or mismatched lifecycle extraction work.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide for recovering blocked PP&D daemon fixture-validation tasks without broad rewrites or live automation.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-15: Add a minimal extension-only lifecycle process skeleton fixture with required facts, required documents, user decisions, citation-backed action gates, and explicit no-live-automation notes from existing fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
